reviews.comment:
Muy linda atención. Y para los que viajan, comer un lomito a la pasada es lo más... son grandes ( comí solo 1/2) y super económicos. Las chicas atienden re bien.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. And for travelers, grabbing a steak sandwich on the go is the best... they're big (I only had half) and super affordable. The staff are really helpful.

reviews.comment:
Siempre paso y paro en esta Estación, pero en  está última visita no tenían variedades de merienda, les faltaba te, mate cocido, etc.
Siempre rescato la Muy Buena atención, la vendedora no tiene la culpa, le pone la mejor...

(Translated by Google)
I always pass by and stop at this station, but on this last visit they didn't have a variety of snacks; they were missing tea, yerba mate, etc. I always appreciate the excellent service; the saleswoman isn't to blame, she does her best.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6487110738096342413/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXNTVQTHh3RRAB
